mesa 0.99.0

PCA results container

Source: R/classes.R
mesaPCA-class.Rd

Stores a PCA fit (from stats::prcomp()) computed over methylation windows.

mesaPCA(prcomp, windows)

# S4 method for mesaPCA
show(object)

Arguments

prcomp

prcomp PCA fit from stats::prcomp(). Default: none.

windows

character() Window IDs used. Default: none.

object

mesaPCA

Value

A mesaPCA object containing the PCA fit and window IDs.

Slots

prcomp

prcomp A PCA fit returned by stats::prcomp().

windows

character() Window IDs used in the PCA.

See also

mesaDimRed

Examples

set.seed(1)
x <- matrix(rnorm(20), nrow = 5, ncol = 4,
            dimnames = list(paste0("S",1:5), paste0("W",1:4)))
pc <- stats::prcomp(x, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
mp <- mesaPCA(prcomp = pc, windows = colnames(x))
mp
#> PCA result for 5 samples calculated over 4 windows

Contents
